name: Harvest Cup
recipeIngredient: Hot water to cover figs, drain after 5 minutes
1 whole fig reserved for each cup
Scissors to snip stems and cut figs into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover figs with hot water and let stand for 5 minutes. Drain.
2. Reserve 1 whole fig for each serving.
3. Snip off stems and cut figs into bite-size pieces using scissors.
4. Arrange fig pieces in dessert glasses with cooked and sweetened cranberries (canned or home-cooked), peeled apples cut into bits, and segments of canned or fresh grapefruit.
5. Cover with plenty of sweetened cranberry juice.
6. Sprinkle confectioners' sugar to taste.
7. Chill for at least one hour.
8. Top with reserved whole fig dipped in honey mixed with a little water.
This recipe is ideal as a first course for your holiday dinner.
